title: Follow-up: Investigation INV-20260712-185041
body: Investigation INV-20260712-185041 identified a pedestrian detection failure in heavy rain at night due to a test coverage gap and potential sensor performance degradation under combined adverse visibility conditions.

next_steps: Add combined adverse visibility scenarios (rain+dusk, fog+night) to the V&V test plan
Obtain and review camera model card with validated performance envelope for combined rain+dusk conditions
Conduct a robustness analysis for perception system under combined rain+dusk conditions
